citation.description: Within the A-to-B-to-C test: re-reviewing plan_b (unchanged content) followed by assert after_unchanged_review.returncode == 0 for plan_c — proves no downstream propagation from unchanged re-review

criteria.criterion: An unchanged successful re-review produces no further propagation.
